preconditions.requirement: Every project-scoped packet call includes root
If a required packet returns ok:false, halt and report the packet error

packetFlow.instruction: Resolve the project root with `cadre_project` using `action: "root"`.
Call `cadre_workflow` with `workflow: "validate"` and any requested track, scope, or repair intent as structured JSON fields.
Use the returned doctor report, team inventory, plan integrity, collision scan, provider status, and review_bundle manifest/path list.
When packet-supported repair is requested, call the workflow packet again with `execute: true` and `humanConfirmed: true` after reviewing proposed canonical JSON changes.
Summarize errors before warnings, then repaired canonical JSON/JSONL artifacts, generated human projections, remaining risks, and next packet.

forbiddenActions: Do not recreate Cadre control-plane, Beads, index, worktree, provider, merge, or cleanup state with shell commands
Do not read or write Markdown projections as canonical state
Do not use Markdown payload fields, legacy Markdown import, or prompt-side state repair
